name: Unity Power Pre-Tool Check
description: 在呼叫任何 unity-mcp 工具前，提醒 AI 必須先 activate Power 並讀取對應的 steering file

then.prompt:
IMPORTANT: Before calling any unity-mcp tools (manage_profiler, manage_graphics, manage_scene, manage_gameobject, etc.), you MUST first:
1. Call kiroPowers(action="activate", powerName="kiro-unity-power") to load the Power documentation
2. Call kiroPowers(action="readSteering", powerName="kiro-unity-power", steeringFile="...") to read the relevant steering file for the task
3. Only THEN proceed with the actual MCP tool calls following the workflow defined in the Power documentation

This applies to ALL Unity-related requests including performance analysis, scene operations, asset management, builds, etc.
